epigraph.text: No one ever went broke underestimating the intelligence of the American public.

follyOfTheDay.headline: Golden Retriever Runs Up $847 Amazon Tab on Alexa
follyOfTheDay.summary:
A Colorado dog owner awoke to discover his golden retriever had been channeling his inner-consumer, utilizing voice-activated Amazon shopping to accumulate premium dog food, organic biscuits, and what can only be described as luxury pet bedding. The canine entrepreneur, whose methods remain inscrutable to behavioral science, had apparently developed an affinity for the Alexa voice command interface with the sophistication of a four-year-old with access to a credit card.

Pet behaviorists have been consulted. They offer no explanation. Amazon has declined to comment on whether this represents a new market demographic. The dog continues to listen for Alexa with what witnesses describe as a disturbing level of intent.
follyOfTheDay.commentary: Amazon's algorithm has finally found its most reliable customer: one with no impulse control and a tail.
